message:
fix(worker_channel): tighten allowed_in_status_snapshot to Queued|Running

Fresh-eyes review: CancelRequested was in allowed_in_status_snapshot,
letting a worker unilaterally transition a Running job to
CancelRequested via status snapshot — bypassing the coordinator's
cancel_job() protocol. CancelRequested is coordinator-owned.

42 worker_channel tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
